settings.title: Greystone Opens a Dedicated Employment Law Practice
settings.excerpt: Local businesses now have a single point of contact for contracts, disputes, and workplace policy.
settings.body:
We have advised on employment matters for years as part of our wider work. From this month, Greystone has a dedicated employment law team so clients no longer have to piece that advice together across departments.

The practice covers the day-to-day questions that come up for any employer. That means contracts, handbooks, disciplinary processes, redundancy, and the disputes that occasionally follow.

It is led by Priya Anand, who has spent fifteen years on both the employer and employee side of the table. Existing clients can reach the team through their usual Greystone contact.
